configSchema.name: workflowId
configSchema.description: Terros workflow to assign upserted accounts to

configSchema.name: workflowTargetMap
configSchema.description: Map a Zoho field name to the workflow target to use when that field is present on the lead, e.g. Session_Cancel_Reason -> Canceled. Checked in the order defined; first match wins.

configSchema.name: workflowTargetFallbackFields
configSchema.description: Zoho fields to fall back to, in order, using the field's own value as the workflow target when none of workflowTargetMap's fields are present, e.g. Lead_Status -> Lead_Status. Only the key is used; set the value to anything.

configSchema.name: customFieldMap
configSchema.description: Map a Zoho field name to the Terros account custom field it should populate, e.g. Session_Cancel_Reason -> Cancel Reason
